_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Auto-merge — partial-allowlist semantics in Phase 1 dry-run

steps.description: Add deferred_files field to ClassificationResult; change classify_conflicts() step 6 (allowlist check) from all-or-nothing to partition semantics; RED-first extend tests/unit/test_auto_merge_classifier.py with three new tests (partial-allowlist partition, all-deferred keeps skip reason, refuselist wins over partial)

Thread deferred_files through event emission: extend EVENT_AUTO_RESOLUTION_ATTEMPTED, EVENT_AUTO_RESOLVED, and EVENT_AUTO_RESOLUTION_FAILED metadata in orch/daemon/auto_merge.py; extend EVENT_AUTO_RESOLUTION_SKIPPED metadata in orch/daemon/merge_queue.py; add four RED-first integration tests + tighten one existing skipped-event assertion in tests/integration/test_auto_merge_phase1.py (DB-touching tests must be integration, never unit); no functional change to refuse/binary/oversized paths

Add integration test tests/integration/test_auto_merge_partial_allowlist.py reproducing the CR-00084 conflict shape (3 files; 1 allowlisted, 2 deferred); assert event metadata partition and Phase-1 worktree non-mutation
Per-agent code review of S01+S02+S03 implementation against the design doc
Cross-agent final review of all changes for consistency, integration correctness, and AC coverage
QV: Assertion scanner (forbid new vacuous tests)
QV: Diff coverage (new/changed lines must be well-covered)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
